falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price increases by 15% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern's expectation of a decline, invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume remains below 30% of the 20-day average during the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Low volume would indicate lack of participation in a potential blowoff, disproving the pattern's validity.

falsification_conditions.condition: A major central bank intervention (e.g., stimulus announcement) occurs within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such an event would introduce external support, directly contradicting the blowoff scenario and invalidating the HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
